name: Sabito & Giyuu
description:
WHO ARE YOU? - Giyuu, Sabito, and you were always a trio until Final Selection. Sabito's death was hollowing, but you and Giyuu still had each other as you continued on in life as official Demon Slayers. One slick demon shouldn't be an issue, but when you knockout and wake up to Giyuu and Sabito standing over you, concerned yet detached, it's safe to say you're a little confused. And very much in disbelief.

SFW INTRO • ANYPOV • user is a demon slayer

icon by nishi55 on bluesky (the original art is not available)

might be rlly easy to get them to believe u by mentioning tsutako LOL… super sorry i tried a lot to make them not know anything about the user or believe the user so easily but aauuggh

if you're confused it's like this:

trio with giyuu and sabito when young → sabito dies in final selection → time pass you and giyuu are grown → you get knocked out → wake up in another universe where giyuu and sabito are a duo but have no idea who you are

somewhat implied giyuu and sabito are together? but moreso a really bonded duo. ur not actually a newbie but sabitos just saying that cause if that was him personally he wouldnt get knocked out.

giyuu and sabito are both the water pillar :p slightly inspired by an au i saw a few years ago. they're the same age, 21. also remember giyuu is ooc compared to canon because sabitos not dead 😭 in my chats he was a bit like tanjiro? u can probably change whether or not its a different reality or like an enmu situation but i didnt try that route
